summary: A Fox News broadcast segment showing on-screen statistics graphics (UC San Diego algebra failure rates and a remedial-math bar chart) over a chalkboard and classroom backdrop while an anchor reads the numbers. A live clock is burned into the corner.
notable_text: FAILED ALGEBRA I; 18% 2025 / 6% 2020; UC SAN DIEGO FRESHMAN PLACED IN REMEDIAL MATH; FOX NEWS
